---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for ClipForge
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['type:feature', 'status:triage']
assignees: []
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. *I'm always frustrated when [...]*

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## User impact

- **Who benefits?** (marketers / agencies / developers / ops / admins)
- **How often would they hit this?** (daily / weekly / monthly / once)
- **Workaround today?** (yes/no — describe if yes)

## Mockups / examples

If you have UI mockups, API examples, or similar projects that already do this, please share.

## Priority (your estimate)

- [ ] Must-have for V1 (we missed the cut)
- [ ] High — V1.x (next 1-2 months)
- [ ] Medium — V2 (next quarter)
- [ ] Low — V3+ (someday)
- [ ] Just an idea

## Are you willing to contribute it?

- [ ] I'd like to implement this myself (please open a discussion first to align on design)
- [ ] I'd like to co-implement with a maintainer
- [ ] I'm filing this for the community to pick up
- [ ] I'm just floating an idea

## Additional context

Anything else relevant (links to similar products, market data, prior art, etc.)
